disposition_codes.label: Gap Closed — Service Verified
disposition_codes.description: Service was completed and claim/documentation is on file; gap can be credited in the system
example_triggers: Member has a claim on file matching the measure numerator criteria
Provider submitted encounter showing completed service

disposition_codes.label: Appointment Scheduled
disposition_codes.description: Member has confirmed appointment scheduled; gap not yet closeable until service is completed
example_triggers: CSR confirms appointment in scheduling system
IVR code: Member confirmed appointment scheduled

disposition_codes.label: Member Claims Completion — Unverified
disposition_codes.description: Member states the service was completed but no supporting claim or documentation exists in the system
example_triggers: Member says 'I already had that done' but no claim on file
IVR code: Member stated already completed
CSR note: Member insists colonoscopy done at out-of-network facility

disposition_codes.label: Member Refused
disposition_codes.description: Member was reached and explicitly declined the service or outreach
example_triggers: Member stated they do not want the service

disposition_codes.label: Voicemail Left
disposition_codes.description: No live member contact; voicemail message left

disposition_codes.label: No Contact — No Message Left
disposition_codes.description: Outreach attempted but no member contact and no message left

disposition_codes.label: Language Barrier
disposition_codes.description: Member reached but communication barrier prevented full outreach; transfer or multilingual follow-up needed
example_triggers: Member spoke only Spanish; transferred to interpreter line

disposition_codes.label: Wrong Number / Invalid Contact
disposition_codes.description: Phone number on file does not reach the member; contact info needs updating
example_triggers: Person who answered is not member

disposition_codes.label: Address Invalid / Mail Returned
disposition_codes.description: Mail returned undeliverable; address on file is incorrect or member moved

disposition_codes.label: Member Opted Out
disposition_codes.description: Member opted out of this outreach channel (SMS STOP, IVR opt-out, do-not-call registry)
example_triggers: Member requested no further contact via this channel

disposition_codes.label: Callback Scheduled
disposition_codes.description: Member requested or agreed to a follow-up call from a live agent
example_triggers: Member agreed to call back next week

disposition_codes.label: Member Excluded
disposition_codes.description: Member meets exclusion criteria: deceased, hospice, disenrolled, or moved out of service area
example_triggers: RETURNED_UNDELIVERABLE with no forwarding address + disenrollment confirmed

disposition_codes.label: Pending — Action in Progress
disposition_codes.description: Outreach resulted in a partial action; follow-up required to confirm closure
example_triggers: Member claims completion but provider confirmation pending
Appointment scheduled but not yet confirmed in system

disposition_codes.label: Web Form Partial Submission
disposition_codes.description: Member started web form self-report but did not complete; data is incomplete
example_triggers: Member reached step 2 of 4 in web form

disposition_codes.label: Web Form Complete — Pending Verification
disposition_codes.description: Member completed web self-report form; self-reported completion awaits claim verification
example_triggers: FORM_SUBMITTED (Web Self Service) with all required fields
Member self-reported completion via web portal
